title: Salty, Flaky, Nostalgic Irish Lamb Toast
description: This dish features lamb shanks in a savory sauce served on toasted bread for a perfect combination of flavor and texture.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix flour, salt, and black pepper.
Dip each lamb shank into the seasoned flour mixture, coating evenly.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent.
Place coated lamb shanks in the skillet. Cook for about 10 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Transfer lamb to a baking dish and pour remaining seasoned flour mixture over them evenly.
Bake in preheated oven for about 2 hours or until meat is tender and easily falls off bones.
